M-017.NAME: route-sync-runtime
M-017.owns: incremental sync of policy decisions into host-level route sets, automated RU IP range updates from multiple sources with fallback, atomic ipset swap with rollback, last-known-good persistence

exports.fn-apply-runtime-route-sync: Applies routing-set changes safely on the host
exports.fn-build-route-sync-plan: Calculates add/remove diffs before touching host ipsets
exports.type-RuIpsetUpdater: Multi-source RU IP fetcher with validation, dedup, and incremental apply

M-017.hotspot: H-005: Incremental route sync is safer than full refresh but easier to get wrong
H-016: RU IP auto-update from external sources could introduce incorrect ranges if validation fails
